creator: chrisipanaque

evidence.text: OpenTelemetry AI Agent # agent-observability A reference implementation for AI agent observability — logging, tracing, and metrics — built directly on OpenTelemetry. ## Problem AI agents fail in ways traditional monitoring cannot see: - **Non-deterministic paths**: the same input triggers different tool sequences across runs. - **Subtle failures**: well-formed but wrong answers, redundant tool calls, semantically invalid actions. - **No decision provenance**: when an agent veers off course, there is no record of *why* it chose one tool over another, what context it considered, or which LLM response drove the
